pull_requests.title: R014: demonstrate crash-recoverable synthetic settlement
pull_requests.head: agent/r014-pcx-durable-settlement
pull_requests.summary: Adds a stacked R014 durable-settlement implementation, schemas, proposal/task/evidence, CLI integration, workflow coverage, and tests; it is not based on main and remains unpromoted.

pull_requests.title: R017: replica-independent history attestations and fork evidence
pull_requests.head: agent/r017-replication-fork-evidence
pull_requests.summary: Adds R017 replication authentication/evidence modules, a partition demo, proposal and task documents, a technical white-paper draft, and focused tests.

pull_requests.title: R018: fixed hybrid post-quantum admission evidence
pull_requests.head: agent/r018-pq-hybrid-admission
pull_requests.summary: Adds a stacked R018 ML-DSA-65 hybrid-admission experiment, isolated JavaScript dependencies and verifier, proposal/task/evidence files, workflow coverage, and tests.

pull_requests.title: Declare OPEN-GATE v0 public protocol bet
pull_requests.head: docs/open-gate-v0-claim
pull_requests.summary: Proposes public-protocol documentation and entry links while also carrying unmerged R017 experiment, proposal, research, task, receipt, implementation, and test paths relative to current main.
